styleSource: What are we capable of? taste profile

activeSlots.anchor: Overview after stat row and before What you'd have
activeSlots.suggestion: Source of truth, working surfaces, outputs and integrations
activeSlots.rationale: Gives Gino the whole system in one glance before the page moves into detail.
activeSlots.risk: Can become generic consulting theater. Keep it text-first, no icons, no shadows, no SaaS boxes.

activeSlots.anchor: Overview after private catalog paragraph and before Artsy note
activeSlots.treatment: live HTML/CSS private catalog artifact using five optimized artwork images
activeSlots.copy: Draft: Five works I thought you'd want to see.
activeSlots.suggestion: One selected work, four related works, and short explanatory copy.
activeSlots.mobileTreatment: Primary work followed by explanatory copy and thumbnail grid.
activeSlots.risk: If too polished, it may imply the app UI is final. Keep it framed as a draft artifact.

activeSlots.anchor: System after the five-table data model table and before The fields are yours
activeSlots.suggestion: Examples of records held in the Relationships table and what each connects.
activeSlots.rationale: Clarifies Relationships after the reader has context for the five tables.
activeSlots.risk: Can get technical fast. Keep fields out of this object because the adjacent table already carries detail.

activeSlots.anchor: System after The agent proposes; you decide and before Integrations
activeSlots.suggestion: Source arrives, AI prepares draft, Gino or Chloe approves, database updates, catalog or outreach uses the record.
activeSlots.rationale: Answers what the AI automates while preserving human approval.
activeSlots.risk: Avoid overpromising. Use prepares and drafts, not language that implies the AI does everything.

atmosphereSlots.anchor: Overview after the opening paragraph and before the stat row
atmosphereSlots.rationale: Puts the system proposal back inside the gallery space before the abstract architecture starts.
atmosphereSlots.risk: If it competes with the operating system map, cut it or move it lower.

atmosphereSlots.anchor: System after the opening architecture paragraph and before Data model
atmosphereSlots.rationale: Reminds the reader that the database serves live relationships, openings, and artwork in rooms.
atmosphereSlots.risk: The square crop may feel too social for the System page; evaluate in the browser.

atmosphereSlots.anchor: Approach after the opening phase paragraph and before Phase 1
atmosphereSlots.rationale: Gives the work plan a human scale before the phase structure begins.
atmosphereSlots.risk: If it reads as event coverage rather than working relationship, cut it.

parkedSlots.anchor: Approach after Phase 3 or before Division of labor
parkedSlots.suggestion: Week 1 audit, Weeks 2 to 6 build v1, ongoing extensions
parkedSlots.rationale: Gives the Approach tab air and makes the engagement feel bounded.
parkedSlots.risk: Can make the timeline feel like a committed scope before terms are aligned. Add only when Noah is ready to stand behind it.

toneCautions: Keep Georgie inside the circle. Her ArtCloud recommendation was reasonable gallery-default advice.
Keep Artsy sync conditional until Georgie confirms the Partner API route.
Keep human approval visible. The AI prepares and drafts; Gino or Chloe approves.
Translate intelligence into practical artifacts: collector history, passed-on works, fair context, relationship notes, outreach timing.
